request_payload.exposure_text: As a mom and former emergency responder, I've seen how important it is to have basic civil defense preparedness. Dr. Linda Chen, our local public health expert, just wrote about how simple community preparedness programs can save lives during emergencies. 'We're not talking about military drills,' she says, 'just common-sense steps to keep families safe.' Our neighbors in Riverdale already have this, and it's made a real difference. Why shouldn't we have the same protection? #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
